summary: Completed testing of MercoTêxtil new features: banco_dados permission in Admin panel, BancoDadosPanel polling, and export reports with artigos data. All tests passed.

minor.issue: Existing users created before the update do not have banco_dados permission field
minor.note: Not a bug - existing data issue. User 'gustavo' missing banco_dados in permissions. New users and default users (admin, interno, externo) have the field correctly.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console) - minor accessibility issue

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed users and artigos during backend testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested and verified working: 1) banco_dados permission checkbox visible in Admin panel (both create and edit user forms), 2) BancoDadosPanel has 5-second polling for auto-refresh, 3) Export functions (exportCompleteReport and exportEspulasReport) fetch artigos data from banco_dados to include engrenagem, enchimento/carga, and ciclos. Note: Reset DB was NOT tested per instructions to avoid data loss.

features_tested.banco_dados_permission_in_create_user: PASSED - Checkbox 'Banco de Dados' visible in Administração panel when creating user
features_tested.banco_dados_permission_in_edit_user: PASSED - Checkbox 'Banco de Dados' visible in Edit User dialog
features_tested.banco_dados_permission_in_backend_user_m: PASSED - User model has banco_dados in permissions (line ~90 server.py)
features_tested.banco_dados_panel_polling: PASSED - BancoDadosPanel has setInterval for 5-second polling (lines 3584-3586)
features_tested.export_complete_report_fetches_artigos: PASSED - exportCompleteReport() fetches /api/banco-dados and uses artigoInfo for engrenagem, ciclos, carga
features_tested.export_espulagem_fetches_artigos: PASSED - exportEspulasReport() fetches /api/banco-dados and populates ENGRENAGEM, ENCHIMENTO, CICLOS from artigos
features_tested.init_data_includes_banco_dados_clear: VERIFIED in code - init_data() line 363 has banco_dados.delete_many({})

code_review_notes.server.py: Line 363: await db.banco_dados.delete_many({}) - correctly added to init_data()
Line 90-98: User model permissions include banco_dados: True
code_review_notes.App.js: Lines 3584-3586: BancoDadosPanel has polling with setInterval(loadArtigos, 5000)
Lines 4267-4271: AdminPanel create user form has banco_dados checkbox
Lines 4454-4458: AdminPanel edit user dialog has banco_dados checkbox
Lines 3982-4037: exportCompleteReport() fetches banco-dados and uses artigoInfo for export
Lines 2663-2726: exportEspulasReport() fetches banco-dados and uses artigoInfo for ENGRENAGEM, ENCHIMENTO, CICLOS
